valid.description: String that both starts and ends with a literal quote character must round-trip losslessly (marketing lib/format/toon.ts:58-65 known bug).
Uniform object array whose cells include a list of scalars must still take the tabular path (fix landed in #148).
A one-element list cell ([1]) must decode as a list, never as the bare scalar 1 (loop scripts/toon_codec.py:33-42 known ambiguity).
Small excerpt of simplicio-mapper's own .simplicio/project-map.json files[] shape (exports/imports list cells).
Small excerpt of simplicio-mapper's own .simplicio/precedent-index.json items[] shape (tags list cells).
Representative (hand-built, not pulled verbatim) simplicio-sprint card-list shape.
Representative (hand-built, not pulled verbatim) simplicio-loop-marketing caption-multi-platform shape.
Representative (hand-built, not pulled verbatim) simplicio-runtime MCP resource-map shape.
Representative (hand-built, not pulled verbatim) simplicio-prompt fanout-aggregation shape.

Real .simplicio/flow-inventory.json excerpt whose flows[] elements contain dict-valued cells (entry/steps/effects) -- expected to fall back to embedded JSON, not a bug; exercises the toon_fallbacks report honestly.

invalid.description: Root tabular array header declares more rows than are present. Pre-#148 mapper decoder raised a bare IndexError.
Nested tabular array header declares more rows than are present.
Row value count does not match the declared field count. sprint's known bug: silently drops the excess value.
Array header is missing the closing bracket on the row count.
A quoted scalar value is never closed.
